feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to save Data from Cloud Services on File System
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

i was wondering if there is a way to save data on filesystem from cloud services like SAC, Datasphere etc..

Is it possible to connect these via Cloud Connector and save data on prem in filesystem? Can you use integration suite for this scenario?

 

Greetings

entry.title: Value map in SAP CPI using xlst and groovy
entry.content:
Need help to read value map in sap cpi using xslt/groovy code. My solution working  with the assumption that input xml can only have one source key. 

Example xml

<TENDER>
<item>
<TENDERNUMBER>2</TENDERNUMBER>
<TENDERTYPECODE>ABC</TENDERTYPECODE>
<TENDERAMOUNT>10.00</TENDERAMOUNT>
</item>
<item>
<TENDERNUMBER>3</TENDERNUMBER>
<TENDERTYPECODE>XYZ</TENDERTYPECODE>
<TENDERAMOUNT>10.00</TENDERAMOUNT>
</item>
</TENDER>

VM table created in CPI

ABC          123

XYZ           456

Since above xml has 2 <item> nodes my solution is not working. How do I fix this  ? or is there a better/new solution to this?

I am using content modifier to read the TENDERTYPECODE value and then next step was a groovy code to read the VM table. This is the flaw as this step does not read multiple item nodes.

Groovy code:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import com.sap.it.api.ITApiFactory
import com.sap.it.api.mapping.ValueMappingApi

def Message processData(Message message) {
def map = message.getProperties();
sAgency = map.get("InputSAgency");
sIdentifier = map.get("InputSIdentifier");
inputValue = map.get("inputValue");
rAgency = map.get("InputRAgency");
rIdentifier = map.get("InputRIdentifier");

def VMservice = ITApiFactory.getService(ValueMappingApi.class, null);
if( VMservice != null)
{
def mappedValue = VMservice.getMappedValue(sAgency, sIdentifier, inputValue, rAgency, rIdentifier)
message.setProperty("outputValue", mappedValue);
}
return message
}

Next iflow step is XSLT to read the VM and replace it in TENDERTYPECODE element.

   <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl=http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform version="3.0" xmlns:xs=http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema exclude-result-prefixes="#all">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>
<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>
<xsl:param name="outputValue"/>
<xsl:template match="/" name="xsl:initial-template">
<xsl:next-match/>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="//TENDERTYPECODE">
<xsl:element name="TENDERTYPECODE">
<xsl:choose>
<xsl:when test="string-length($outputValue)>0">
<xsl:value-of select="$outputValue"/>
</xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise>
<xsl:value-of select="."/>
</xsl:otherwise>
</xsl:choose>
</xsl:element>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

    Thanks

entry.title: Processing multiple file from single sender channel in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I would like to process multiple files from various paths using a single sender channel in SAP CPI. Is this possible? I attempted to configure `/Data/*` as the directory, where different file paths are specified, but it didn’t work.

 

If anyone has experience with this requirement, please let me know. Thank you!

entry.title: Error in Connectivity test between LMS and EC via CPI using Postman
entry.content:
Hi all!

I am working on connecting LMS to Employee Central using CPI.

More specifically, we need to extract the status of the courses taken by employees and send them to an MDF Object created in Employee Central through CPI.

We performed the connection test with Postman and got an error with the following details:

Connection URL

https://XXXX.lms.sapsf.com/learning/oauth-api/rest/v1/token -> Where XXXX is the company

 

Authorization

 

Where XXXX -> Company

Client Secret -> Generated in LMS

Body

ADMIN -> User created in LMS

 

The following permissions were assigned to ADMIN user in LMS

 

Error in Postman:

 

Are there additional permissions required for ADMIN user to be able to establish a connection?

If you have any supporting documentation, please share it with me.

Thanks!

entry.title: Best practices to handle SFTP Receiver Adapter error conditions : Payload Retention
entry.content:
I've done a bit of research on persistent messaging and external logging for MPL payloads, etc, with the intent of retaining application data in various ways. However, nothing seemed to fit quite right for a specific scenario I'm trying to deal with so I wanted to see what others are doing to address this. In the end we might just have to do this, but before we do I figured I'd see what other options there might be.

With an SFTP integration, in most cases a simple pass-through, we have an SFTP Sender and Receiver adapter for the iFlow. What we recently noticed is that if the SFTP Sender works fine but the SFTP Receiver has an error, such as HTTP connection issue (server down), then the post processing of the SFTP Sender still seems to run, which in most of our cases is to delete the file from where we picked it up. But, with the iFlow now in error state, we lose the file. Our old PI system would retain this automatically and allow a restart - but Integration Suite doesn't seem to offer this. So, the scenario is, how to deal with the exception and not lose our file? I'm leaving the question fairly open to see what other, maybe more creative ideas, have come up with to solve for this. Thanks.

entry.title: POST Survey Response into C4C through OData API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to post survey responses from an external system to SAP C4C using the OData API. We’ve looked into the following API: [https://myXXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('ObjectID')/SurveyResponse]

While it successfully creates the survey in C4C associated with a phone call, it's not updating the survey answers. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Accessing SAP Business Hub Accelerator and API Management Client SDK on Eco System
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to access the options which are on the "Explore Our Ecosystem" on Integration Suite Trial Account. I have all the Roles and Authorizations, yet when I click those options nothing works. I created two sub accounts in different regions and both are having same issue. I am not sure what is that I am doing incorrectly, can someone please be generous enough to guide me.

I am accessing this on the server hosted on the US east coast.

 

Regards

Nitin

@Sripad @Finny @SAPSupport 

 

SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network

entry.title: Stuck at SAP tutorial to create instance on BAMBOOHR
entry.content:
hey SAP geeks, (sorry if  I'd catch the wrong channel, I couldn't find a better one)

I'd tried sevreal time to perform the described steps on the SAP tutorial (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-integration-suite-nonsapconnectivity-openconnectors.html ) without any success and after reading plenty of webpages and trying to understand what could be the issue, I am trying my last hope at this place.

After having meticulousy set everything as requested , I always get this error message back = >

 

I had even delte and recreated the trial tenant, just to be sure, that I'd missed nothing. 

No changes and same error message displayed.

In advance many thanks for your inputs and supports,

Daniel

 

 

Other references: https://documentation.bamboohr.com/docs/getting-started#authentication

entry.title: Event Mesh - limit of 32767 reached
entry.content:
Good day,

I am currently facing a challenge while trying to publish more than 30,000 records to Event Mesh from SAP Cloud Integration using the AMQP adapter in my iFlow. During this process, I encounter the following error:

"org.springframework.jms.ResourceAllocationException: @Priya0/xb-msg-amqp-v100 0.9.63 [502] failed to generate new handle, limit of 32767 reached [condition = amqp:resource-limit-exceeded]; nested exception is javax.jms.ResourceAllocationException: @Priya0/xb-msg-amqp-v100 0.9.63 [502] failed to generate new handle, limit of 32767 reached [condition = amqp:resource-limit-exceeded], cause: org.apache.qpid.jms.provider.exceptions.ProviderConnectionResourceAllocationException: @Priya0/xb-msg-amqp-v100 0.9.63 [502] failed to generate new handle, limit of 32767 reached [condition = amqp:resource-limit-exceeded]"

From what I understand, this error indicates that the limit for AMQP resources has been reached, specifically the limit on handles, which is set to 32,767. It seems that open connections are not being closed properly, leading to this resource allocation issue.

Here are some details about my setup:

  • Integration Flow: Getting employee records from SuccessFactors and publishing these records to Event Mesh. 
  • Volume of Records: Attempting to publish over 30,000 records at once.
  • AMQP Adapter Version: @Priya0/xb-msg-amqp-v100 0.9.63

    I would appreciate any guidance on the following:

    • Best practices for managing connections in an iFlow on the AMQP adapter to prevent exceeding resource limits.
    • Recommendations for adjusting Event Mesh connection limits if necessary.

      Thank you in advance for your help! I look forward to your suggestions and insights.

entry.title: SHA-512 error in CPI but works in groovyide
entry.content:
Hi All,

The below code works fine in groovy ide and i am trying to convert a string to SHA-512 encoded string.

Error received in SAP CPI is 

No signature of method: java.lang.String.digest() is applicable for argument types: (java.lang.String) values: [SHA-512]
Possible solutions: getAt(java.lang.String), next(), toSet(), size(), size(), toList()

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message; 
import java.util.HashMap; 
import java.security.MessageDigest; 
import java.security.*
import java.text.DateFormat; 
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat; 
import java.util.Date; 
import java.time.*
def Message processData(Message message) {
    def props = message.getProperties();
    def origDate = props.get("date")
    Date oldDate = Date.parse('yyyy-MM-ddHH:mm:ss', origDate);
    long datetimestampUnix = oldDate.getTime();
    datetimestampUnix = datetimestampUnix/1000
 message.setHeader("iat", datetimestampUnix)
 def body = datetimestampUnix+"ClientID"+"Password"+"ClientSecret"+"username"
 message.setHeader("Hash", body)
 body = body.get
      def sha512 = body.digest('SHA-512')
     message.setHeader("SHA-512", sha512)
	return message;
}

entry.title: Information about who/when was an integration artefact undeployed
entry.content:
Hello community,

does someone of you know how to get the information about
- who undeployed a specific integration artefact
- when has an integration artefact been undeployed?

I would assume this information will be stored in some log file because of security and consistency reasons.
I already checked the system logs (http log and trace log) and the APIs for Cloud Integration. So far I couldn't find a place to get this information.

Would appreciate any idea where I could do have a look into.

entry.title: i can't able to see my integration suite
entry.content: today morning i am opening my integration suite, but after 2 hours its not showing in my subscription.can anyone help me on this issue.

entry.title: How to Gather Error Logs in sap CPI.
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I have a requirment, Once i get the data into CPI, i split the each record and will post to two APIs in paralell, My req here when ever there is an error i need to send an email of all errors with source data, each record i send an email, but how to merger all these records into, Since im using router, i cant able to use gather option and even gather is not working in exception subprocess, Can anyone help on this requirment.

 

Thank You!

#cpi#sapcpi#gather#ErrorHandling

entry.title: Integration Suite, Basic Edition - Restricted No. of Messages 10K & Exceeding the Messages Actions
entry.content:
The customer has in scope "Integration suite - basic edition", and the number of outbound/inbound messages are limited to 10K, with the metrics definition of the messages.

My questions here are:
1- What is the recommendations to be taken to minimize the number of messages during the integration design?
2- Regarding monitoring the messages, I know it is available and can monitor during the operation, what if the messages exceeded the limit 10K, I know it will be payed as an extra 1 block of 10K messages, but how this will be planned, for the customer can plan his payments?

entry.title: Integration suite - trading partner management - EDIFACT envelope
entry.content:
Hello integration experts,

In trying to build a mapping guideline (MAG) using two mapping implementation guidelines (idoc to EDI), I stumble upon the problem that the interchange control UNB-S0020 and UNZ-S0020 are not filled. Does anyone know how to configure or code this? In my specific case, those two fields should be the same in an EDI, but can vary between EDIs. Thanks in advance

entry.title: URL giving empty response from POSTMAN/CPI but working fine with Browser
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I am trying to use the URL from browser to get the details, it is working as expected(No Authentication Required). But, when trying to get the details from POSTMAN it is showing an empty response [].

Similar is the case with CPI HTTP adapter as well.

Please suggest, where I am going wrong. I tried other methods apart from GET but nothing working.

Thanks,

Nidhi

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Monday.com and S/4HANA Public integration
entry.content:
My customer are using Monday.com to track their projects and want to integrate this with SAP. They are currently using S/4HANA Public. 
Do we have any customer reference or other customers that have done this integration? 

Many thanks!

entry.title: Issue subscribing to an event broker from solace in CI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to subscribe to an event broker created on solace through advanced event mesh adapter in CI. I am getting the below mentioned error on deploying the iFlow. Please assist.

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Is AEM adapter available in NEO environment ?
entry.content:
Do you know if Advanced event mesh adapter is available in neo environment ? 

Thanks
